summary: Clean reader shell and persist vault selection
description: Remember current vault and recent vaults locally, add switcher UI, show vault size in GB, remove redundant Opened/subtitle header chrome, and split sidebar/document scrolling.
acceptance: sidebar scroll is independent from document pane; header shows filename/path only; current vault persists across restart; recent vault switcher exists; vault summary includes GB

evidence.summary: Implemented localStorage remembered vault + recent vault switcher, GB vault summary, non-redundant filename/path header, independent sidebar/document scroll CSS; verified by npm run check; Vite browser smoke blocked by missing Tauri invoke outside Tauri runtime.
